name: Frozen Cranberry Slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Turn the temperature control of the refrigerator to the coldest setting.
2. Thoroughly combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
3. Spoon the mixture into an ice-cube tray.
4. Freeze until just firm, about 24 hours.
5. Reset the temperature control to the desired setting for serving.
6. If the mixture is too firm when ready to serve, place it in the refrigerator for a few minutes to soften slightly.
7. Cut into slices and serve.
Makes 8 to 10 servings.
